detectors.description:
QureDAO.sendETHToFee(uint256) (QureDAO.sol#615-621) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (QureDAO.sol#617)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (QureDAO.sol#619)
detectors.markdown:
[QureDAO.sendETHToFee(uint256)](QureDAO.sol#L615-L621) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](QureDAO.sol#L617)
	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](QureDAO.sol#L619)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in QureDAO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (QureDAO.sol#467-595):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (QureDAO.sol#563)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (QureDAO.sol#609)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (QureDAO.sol#569)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (QureDAO.sol#617)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (QureDAO.sol#619)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (QureDAO.sol#591)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (QureDAO.sol#721)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (QureDAO.sol#701)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (QureDAO.sol#703)
	QureDAO._rOwned (QureDAO.sol#231) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- QureDAO._takeTeam(uint256) (QureDAO.sol#715-723)
	- QureDAO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (QureDAO.sol#697-711)
	- QureDAO.balanceOf(address) (QureDAO.sol#347-351)
	- QureDAO.constructor(address,address) (QureDAO.sol#293-311)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (QureDAO.sol#591)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (QureDAO.sol#729)
	QureDAO._rTotal (QureDAO.sol#243) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- QureDAO._getCurrentSupply() (QureDAO.sol#795-805)
	- QureDAO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (QureDAO.sol#727-733)
	- QureDAO.constructor(address,address) (QureDAO.sol#293-311)
	- QureDAO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (QureDAO.sol#403-411)

		- _teamAddress = addr1 (QureDAO.sol#295)

detectors.description:

	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (QureDAO.sol#645)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (QureDAO.sol#645)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _maxTxAmount = 30000000000 * 10 ** 9 (QureDAO.sol#653)
	- cooldownEnabled = true (QureDAO.sol#649)
	- liquidityAdded = true (QureDAO.sol#651)
	- swapEnabled = true (QureDAO.sol#647)

detectors.description:
QureDAO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (QureDAO.sol#467-595) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool)(buycooldown[to] < block.timestamp) (QureDAO.sol#497)
	- require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp) (QureDAO.sol#513)
	- firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp (QureDAO.sol#515)
detectors.markdown:

	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [require(bool)(buycooldown[to] < block.timestamp)](QureDAO.sol#L497)
	- [require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp)](QureDAO.sol#L513)
	- [firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp](QureDAO.sol#L515)

detectors.description: QureDAO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (QureDAO.sol#467-595) has a high cyclomatic complexity (14).

Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (QureDAO.sol#9)
